name: vendor.myndhyve.canvas
description: First vendor-namespace pack. Ships MyndHyve canvas-coordination nodes — canvasRead / canvasWrite / canvasCreate / crossCanvasInvoke — preserving the `core.coordination.*` typeIds in the wild (typeId-preserve strategy from the migration plan §4). The pack itself is MyndHyve-internal: hosts that don't advertise `host.canvas: supported` cannot register it.
author: MyndHyve

nodes.label: Canvas Read
nodes.description: Reads canvas state by ID. Side-effectful + cacheable — canvas state changes over time, so reads at different points in a run can differ; replay caching pins the value seen at first read.

nodes.label: Canvas Write
nodes.description: Mutates canvas state. Side-effectful — applies the mutation atomically via the host's canvas adapter. Deterministic Idempotency-Key derivation prevents duplicate writes on replay.

nodes.label: Canvas Create
nodes.description: Creates a new canvas (typed per canvasTypeId — app-builder, slides, cms-builder, etc.). Side-effectful — registers a new canvas with the host; replay returns the originally-created canvasId without re-creating.

nodes.label: Cross-Canvas Invoke
nodes.description: Invokes a workflow on a target canvas (different from the calling run's canvas). Routes through the host's canvas-router with circuit-breaker semantics. Returns the child runId + optionally awaits terminal status.
